zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Noell於大約1128年出生在英國斯塔福爾艾倫哈爾時，他的父親William de Noel22歲，母親Celestria de Limesi22歲。他於大約1150年與Lady Alice de Montfort結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾倫哈爾享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Noell于大约1128年出生在英国斯塔福爾艾倫哈爾时，他的父亲William de Noel22岁，母亲Celestria de Limesi22岁。他于大约1150年与Lady Alice de Montfort结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾倫哈爾享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Noell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Nöll): habitational name from any of several places in Rhineland and Westphalia named Nöll. Compare Noll 3.

variants.name: Noll
meanings: German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names composed of the first element ending with -n + wald ‘rule’, for example Arnold and Reinwald .
South German: nickname for a rotund or naive person, from Middle High German nol ‘hillock, knoll’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Noell was born about 1128, in Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England, his father, William de Noel, was 22 and his mother, Celestria de Limesi, was 22. He married Lady Alice de Montfort about 1150. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1219, in Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Noell est né environ 1128, à Ellenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Noel, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Celestria de Limesi, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Montfort environ 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1219, à Ellenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Noell um 1128 in Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Noel 22 und seine Mutter Celestria de Limesi 22. Er hat um 1150 Lady Alice de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1219 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Noell è nato il circa 1128 nel Ellenhall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Noel, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Celestria de Limesi, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Montfort circa 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1219, nel Ellenhall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Noellが約1128年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエレンハルで生まれた時，父William de Noelは22歳，母Celestria de Limesiは22歳であった。約1150年にLady Alice de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエレンハルで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Noell(이)가 대략 1128년 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘렌홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Noel(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Celestria de Limesi(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 Lady Alice de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘렌홀에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Noell nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Ellenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Noel, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Celestria de Limesi, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Montfort aproximadamente 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1219, em Ellenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Noell родился около 1128 г. в местности элленолл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Noel было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Celestria de Limesi, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Montfort около 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1219 г. в местности элленолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.
